item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: The Week Ahead: January 12-16, 2025 | Washington State House Republicans
item.description: News article "The Week Ahead: January 12-16, 2025 | Washington State House Republicans" from House Republicans.

item.title: First reading, referred to Transportation.
item.description: First reading, referred to Transportation.

item.title: 👍Thad Duvall - Douglas County Auditor
item.description: Thad Duvall signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Douglas County Auditor.

item.title: 👍Marianne Nichols - Pend Oreille County Auditor
item.description: Marianne Nichols signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Pend Oreille County Auditor.

item.title: ❓Brian Cullinane - Washington Association of Vehicle Subagents
item.description: Brian Cullinane signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington Association of Vehicle Subagents.

item.title: 👍Sally Estes - Pend Oreille County Auditor
item.description: Sally Estes signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Sally Estes - Pend Oreille County Auditor
item.description: Sally Estes signed up to testify Pro.
